title: phacelia hispida subvar. cicutaria
intro: Phacelia hispida subvar. cicutaria, also known as Cut-leaved Phacelia, is a variety of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phacelia hispida subvar. cicutaria include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Phacelia hispida subvar. cicutaria can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
